title: Resolve Expected Returns
description: The system shall allow users to act upon pending returns by either logging a refund (creating a reverse-expense) or dismissing the expected return flag.
acceptance_criteria: Pending returns widget allows selecting an item to 'Log Refund' or 'Dismiss'
Dismiss action requires user confirmation via a dialog and removes the 'Return Expected' flag from the transaction upon confirmation
Log Refund action opens a dedicated dialog containing:
- Non-editable original transaction info: full Account (with currency/owner), Category, Project
- Original amount and total amount already returned
- Data displayed in a row-based layout with labels and bold values
- Entry field for current refund amount (defaulting to the remaining balance)
Logging a refund creates a negative expense under the original category and account, linked via refundLinkedId
If 'More refunds follow' is OFF, dismisses the return flag; if ON, keeps it active for future refunds
Completing a full refund or dismissal removes the item from the pending returns list
